data.content: Fixed the thinking detail toggle so it actually filters tool output. Two changes: (1) History view: filterEntry now also hides 'result' type entries when detail is off, not just 'user' and 'system'. (2) Terminal filter: rewrote as a state machine that suppresses ALL content after ▶ action headers (not just numbered file lines) until agent prose resumes. Prose detection uses uppercase-letter-start heuristic. All 2164 tests pass, 18 terminal-detail-filter tests (6 new). Build failure in work/foolery-c355 is pre-existing and unrelated.
